197 F2D F2D_EXPRS_ANGER (F2D) Openly Express Conflict with Family/Friends CHAR 1 Psychosocial well-being: unsettled relationships - openly expresses conflict/anger with family/friends. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
198 F2E F2E_NO_CNTCT_FAM (F2E) Absense of Personal Contact with Family/Friends CHAR 1 Psychosocial well-being: unsettled
